name: POET, LLC
summary: POET, LLC produces ethanol and other bio-refined products. Its products include biofuels, such as corn-based ethanol and cellulosic ethanol; feed solutions, asphalt rejuvenator and modification solution, captured carbon, and ethanol cooking fuel. POET, LLC was formerly known as Broin Companies, LLC and changed its name to POET, LLC in March 2007. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Sioux Falls, South Dakota.
